sourceLabel: Lexicon IELTS and Spoken English Institute courses and batches

entries.title: IELTS Academic programme
entries.content: Lexicon's IELTS Academic programme is designed for students aiming for university admission or higher-study applications. The usual batch format runs for around 8 to 10 weeks with guided reading, listening drills, writing task feedback, speaking mock practice, and strategy sessions on band descriptors.

entries.title: IELTS General Training programme
entries.content: The IELTS General Training programme is built for learners targeting migration, work-related English testing, or profile-specific overseas requirements. The centre usually covers letter writing, practical vocabulary, speaking confidence, and timed mock tests with trainer review.

entries.title: Spoken English fluency programme
entries.content: Lexicon also runs spoken English batches for learners who want better confidence in daily conversation, interviews, office communication, or presentation basics. The programme usually starts with a level check, then covers grammar correction, vocabulary building, guided speaking, and confidence practice in small groups.

entries.title: PTE and interview communication support
entries.content: PTE preparation and interview-communication support may be offered in selected cycles depending on trainer availability. The safe front-desk response is to confirm the currently active PTE or interview batch before promising immediate admission, because this module is not treated as permanently open in every month.
